(01) — About © 2026

A product designer who loves thoughtful, useful interfaces — I design AI-powered fintech experiences for complex private-market data, dashboards, and decision workflows.

I care about crisp labels, honest empty states, scalable components, and the small details that help people trust what they are seeing. Clarity is usually hiding inside the chaos — I just like finding it.
